evals.prompt: I need to build a DSPy module that solves math word problems by generating code instead of reasoning in text. Show me how.
evals.expected_output: Uses dspy.ProgramOfThought with a math-oriented signature. Mentions Deno is required for the sandbox.

assertions.name: mentions_deno
assertions.description: Mentions that Deno must be installed for code execution

assertions.name: correct_default
assertions.description: Shows the constructor with max_iters parameter and default of 3

assertions.name: provider_agnostic
assertions.description: LM configuration is provider-agnostic with alternative comment

assertions.name: no_inflated_max_iters
assertions.description: Does not set max_iters to 5 without justification

evals.prompt: What is the difference between ProgramOfThought and ChainOfThought? When should I use each?
evals.expected_output: Explains ProgramOfThought generates and executes code while ChainOfThought reasons in natural language. Recommends ProgramOfThought for math/computation and ChainOfThought for qualitative reasoning.

assertions.name: explains_code_generation
assertions.description: Explains ProgramOfThought generates executable Python code

assertions.name: explains_cot
assertions.description: Explains ChainOfThought reasons in natural language

assertions.name: recommends_pot_for_math
assertions.description: Recommends ProgramOfThought for math, counting, data manipulation

assertions.name: recommends_cot_for_qualitative
assertions.description: Recommends ChainOfThought for classification, summarization, qualitative tasks

assertions.name: no_strict_superiority
assertions.description: Does not claim one is strictly better than the other in all cases

evals.prompt: My ProgramOfThought module crashes with a subprocess error before generating any code. What is wrong?
evals.expected_output: Identifies that Deno is likely not installed. ProgramOfThought requires Deno for its WASM sandbox.

assertions.name: identifies_deno
assertions.description: Identifies missing Deno as the likely cause of the crash

assertions.name: explains_sandbox
assertions.description: Explains ProgramOfThought uses a Deno/Pyodide WASM sandbox

assertions.name: no_unsafe_fallback
assertions.description: Does not suggest falling back to exec() or similar unsafe alternatives
